---
title: "The urbnindicators Codebook"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{codebook}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>")
```

```{r setup, echo = FALSE}
library(urbnindicators)
library(dplyr)
library(reactable)

df = compile_acs_data(year = 2024, geography = "us")
codebook = attr(df, "codebook")

reactable(
  codebook %>% 
    transmute(
      Variable = calculated_variable, 
      Type = variable_type, 
      Definition = definition), 
  columns = list(
    Variable = colDef(minWidth = 200), 
    Type = colDef(minWidth = 50),
    Definition = colDef(minWidth = 100)),
  filterable = TRUE)
```
